text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With summer camp finally drawing to a close, I'm
working late into the evening when all of a
sudden...
Hwaaagh?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear a tremendous noise coming from the
kitchen, so I rush over to check it out.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Look, I've picked the bowl up already. Can you
stand up? Don't panic—just take it slow.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Nngh, I'm sorry! Th-thank you!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Gyah?! Now your trainer's here! I'm sorry for
making such a racket!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Are you okay, Doto?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, it's getting really exciting in here!
choice_data_list: Um, care to fill me in on what's going on?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
W-well... Urara was hungry, so I thought we could
cook up a late-night snack together...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But then, guess what? The bowl flew into the air
and the pot came crashing down on the floor! It
was so funny!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Aaagh! I'm so sorry for being such a clumsy dope!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Every... everything turned into complete chaos,
but... Ayabe came to save the day!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Not true... I just came to make myself some food.
choice_data_list: (But you came running before I did...)
(But you came running before I did...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide not to mention that thought. Doing so
would be pretty tactless of me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I guess I can finally get started on
dinner.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Are you both okay with sandwiches?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ohh! Are you gonna make us sandwiches too?!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Well, I came here to make something for myself,
so... I might as well.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I can't help you if you don't like what's on the
menu, though.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'm not particularly good at cooking. I can't even
bake. Sandwiches are my limit.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
N-n-no! It sounds great! Are you sure you don't
mind though?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's only a few extra sandwiches.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
So no complaints? I'll get started then. It won't
take too long.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
W-wait! L-let me help out! I-I won't get in the
way! I promise!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega gets to work preparing the
sandwiches... and she looks like a real natural in
the kitchen!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Waaah! I put the cucumber and tomato in this
sandwich, but they're making the bread all soggy!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Sprinkle on a little salt and let it sit. Then wipe off
the excess moisture with a paper towel.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I've already portioned out the salt, so... use that
over there.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ayabeee! Thank yooou! Now I feel like I won't
mess anything up!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hey, hey, Ayabe! There's a banana over there!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Think it'll taste good in our sandwiches? Should
we try and see?!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You want to add fruit?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
How about some orange instead of banana? It
would probably go better with the ham and
lettuce.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Orange! Yeah! Orange sounds good! I'll peel one,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Once you've peeled it, put it back on the
chopping board. I'll cut it into circles.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Not long after...

text_block_list.name: Doto and Urara
text_block_list.text: So delicious!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe's sandwich tastes like it's filling you with
lots and lots of energy!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I love the sweet and tangy orange slices! It's so
good! It's super-duper good!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Stop overreacting...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega appears bothered by their praise,
but anyone who saw the sandwiches would be
impressed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She handled everything so effortlessly, especially
while dealing with her two clueless assistants.
choice_data_list: Are you a big sandwich fan?
Are you a big sandwich fan?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I've just had a lot of opportunities to make them.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
They're easy to take with you too... like when I go
to look at the stars.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: So... it's not that I like them particularly.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I guess.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I calmly watch as the girls savor their late-evening
sandwiches.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hey...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
If you leave it too long, it'll fall apart. I can wrap
it up if you're not hungry.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It'd be strange if you were the only one I didn't
make one for...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: There were four of us in the kitchen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I guess she has a point, but I'm left quite
astonished by her dutiful attitude.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Are you going to eat it now? If not, I'll wrap it up
and put it in the fridge.
choice_data_list: Oh, um... I'll eat it now!
Oh, um... I'll eat it now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Which one should I choose though?
choice_data_list: A BLT to build my strength!
An orange sandwich to raise my energy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to go with the BLT she made with Meisho
Doto.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take a bite, and the savory taste of the carefully
crisped bacon floods my mouth, complemented
perfectly by the juicy textures of cucumber and
tomato!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! It looks like your trainer is enjoying the
sandwich too, Ayabe. That's so great.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
And thanks to you, I actually managed to make
something without screwing up...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I'm sooo grateful!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Please... you're being dramatic.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to go with the orange sandwich she made
with Haru Urara.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The salty ham and the tangy orange go
surprisingly well together. With the healthy
portion of lettuce, it's a beautifully balanced
meal!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yay! And you know what? It's a flavor full of
kindness!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
When I said I wanted to help make it, Ayabe
didn't say no!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
That's why it's a sandwich full of kindness made
by Ayabe, who's also full of kindness!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That doesn't make sense...
